zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthew de Hulgreve於1245年出生在英國爾南特維其時，他的父親Mathew de Hulgreve50歲，母親Alicia Maria de Verdon33歲。他和Mabel Bunbury至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1350年在英國爾邱奇 明書爾享年105歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthew de Hulgreve was born in 1245, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, his father, Mathew de Hulgreve, was 50 and his mother, Alicia Maria de Verdon, was 33. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Mabel Bunbury. He died in 1350, in Church Minshull, Cheshire, England, at the age of 105.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matthew de Hulgreve est né en 1245, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Mathew de Hulgreve, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Alicia Maria de Verdon, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Mabel Bunbury. Il est décédé en 1350, à Church Minshull, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 105 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matthew de Hulgreve 1245 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mathew de Hulgreve 50 und seine Mutter Alicia Maria de Verdon 33. Er hatte mit Mabel Bunbury mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1350 im Alter von 105 Jahren in Church Minshull, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matthew de Hulgreve è nato il nel 1245 nel Nantwich, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Mathew de Hulgreve, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Alicia Maria de Verdon, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Mabel Bunbury. Morì nel 1350, nel Church Minshull, Cheshire, England, all'età di 105 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Matthew de Hulgreve(이)가 1245년 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathew de Hulgreve(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia Maria de Verdon(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Mabel Bunbury(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 영국 체실르 처르치 민슈에서 105세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthew de Hulgreve родился в 1245 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Mathew de Hulgreve было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia Maria de Verdon, 33. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Mabel Bunbury. Он умер в 1350 г. в местности чурч миншулл, чешир, Англия в возрасте 105 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Mabel Bunbury. Murió en 1350, en Church Minshull, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 105 años.
